title: SKELETON-IDENTIFY output — walking skeleton designation + seam coverage

verticality_ref.description: Path to 03-verticality.json this identification is based on.

slices_ref.description: Path to 02-slices.json providing candidate slice details.

foundational_seams.description: Four seam categories (or project's actual set) with presence flags and project instances.

seam.description: Seam category name: ingress, domain, persistence, or primary_external_integration.

present.description: True when this seam category genuinely appears in the aPRD; false when absent.

instance.description: Concrete functional instance for this project; null when present:false. No component/stack/vendor.

grounded_in.description: aPRD IDs that exist verbatim and establish this seam; empty when present:false.

reason.description: Why this seam category is absent from the aPRD (present:false only).

eligible_slices.description: Exactly the valid[] slice ids from 03-verticality.json.

skeleton.description: Designated walking skeleton slice, or null when no single slice crosses all seams.

id.description: Slice S* identifier carried verbatim from 02-slices.json.

qualifying_acceptance.description: Qualifying AC* IDs carried verbatim from 03-verticality.json.

retires_risk.description: Risk retired by this slice, carried verbatim from 02-slices.json, or null.

seam_coverage.description: Maps every present seam to the slice AC/requirement touching it and what it must establish.

seam.description: Seam category name this entry covers.

touched_by.description: AC* or R* ID from the skeleton slice that touches this seam.

establishes.description: Functional touch-point the skeleton must prove at this seam — never design/stack/vendor.

minimal_behaviour_rationale.description: Why this is the thinnest end-to-end slice — what feature depth stays deferred.

selection_rationale.description: Why this slice over other eligible ones — dependency root, riskiest seam, risk retirement.

skeleton_seams.description: One entry per present foundational seam the skeleton must establish; consumed by FOUNDATION-CUT and Phase 3.

must_establish.description: Foundational capability skeleton must prove at this seam — functional, never component/stack/vendor.

grounded_in.description: aPRD IDs that exist verbatim and ground this seam requirement.

rejected_as_skeleton.description: Every eligible slice that is not the skeleton; skeleton + rejected_as_skeleton covers eligible_slices exactly once.

reason.description: Why not selected: misses seam, not dependency root, deeper than needed, does not exercise primary integration.

uncovered_seams.description: Empty when skeleton found; when skeleton null, lists present seams no single eligible slice crosses.
